_readme: Optional: enables decoding the ENCRYPTED barcode on SA driver's licences (surname + initials + ID). Copy this file to lib/za-dl-keys.json and paste the RSA public keys (hex modulus + exponent). Get them from an open SADL decoder project (e.g. github: RuanBritz/Decode_SA_Drivers_Licence, dalion619/sadl-pdf417-decryption) or use a commercial SDK (Dynamsoft/barKoder/Scandit) instead and skip this. Without this file, scan-in still works via the 13-digit ID number (typed or any barcode carrying it) — DOB and gender are derived automatically. za-dl-keys.json is gitignored; never commit real keys.
